visual_mood: Layered editorial type collage -- multiple font sizes overlapping with the product, magazine cover energy

text_elements.position: massive, overlapping with POLARIZED, lower portion

product.placement: The sunglasses sit naturally within the layered text composition on a dark surface -- arms open, resting on the surface between the text layers. Part of the collage, not separate from it.
product.instruction: Only ONE pair matching the reference. Real matte sunglasses on a real dark surface. The product exists within the text layers as part of one composed shot.

prompt: An editorial type collage composition on a deep black background. Bold white italic text at multiple sizes and slight angles layered together: large 'POLARIZED' in the upper portion and massive 'ALWAYS.' overlapping below, both in the typeface from the font reference. ONE pair of Outback Red sunglasses from DuberyMNL rests on a dark surface within the text layers -- real matte sunglasses matching the reference image, naturally integrated into the collage as if product and text were arranged together on the same surface. Everything lit by the same dramatic side light. Small 'DUBERY MNL' tucked in the lower area. DuberyMNL logo bottom-right. 4:5 aspect ratio, magazine cover energy.
